overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from a yellow crosswalk along a wet sidewalk lined with trash bags and neon advertisements, following pedestrians before turning at an intersection with passing traffic. The scene features characteristic neon lighting, digital billboards, and a persistent wet reflective ground surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city crosswalk with steam vents and neon signage

steps off the yellow crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: moving forward across the yellow striped crosswalk toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk directly toward the camera

industrial steam vent releasing white vapor onto the street
decorative trees with vibrant pink foliage lining the sidewalk
large illuminated digital advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at night, facing a yellow crosswalk. Steam rises from a vent on the left while neon billboards glow on the right. A pedestrian approaches and crosses in front of the camera before the viewpoint steps onto the sidewalk, passing pink decorative trees and trash bags.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with accumulated trash bags and towering digital advertisements

events.description: character in brown jacket with glowing back design appears walking ahead
passing large pile of garbage bags accumulated against the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian wearing a brown jacket with a glowing back design and red pants

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a distinctive brown jacket with red pants and a glowing back emblem

entered.detail: large accumulated piles of garbage bags and debris against the building wall
large teal neon corporate sign reading 'softsys' on a building facade
illuminated advertising pillar displaying a woman's face

segments.scene_description: Moving along the narrow wet sidewalk, the camera follows a character in a brown jacket past accumulated trash bags. The 'softsys' neon sign becomes visible on the right, while digital billboards illuminate the path ahead. The pedestrian ahead maintains a steady walking pace as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with multi-lane traffic and large corporate signage

events.description: reaching the intersection and beginning to turn right
black sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: reaching the intersection, observing traffic, and turning right onto the cross street

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad intersection with multiple crossing lines and traffic signals
red illuminated sign reading 'Capitol' on a building corner
tall pole with traffic signals and a digital speed limit display showing 40

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide intersection dominated by the large 'softsys' neon sign. After the pedestrian in brown moves aside, the viewpoint turns right at the corner, passing a red 'Capitol' sign. A black sports car drives through the intersection as the camera completes the turn onto the cross street, with traffic lights and new digital billboards coming into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit intersection. It begins at a yellow crosswalk where steam rises from a vent and a pedestrian passes by, before the viewpoint steps onto the sidewalk past pink decorative trees and piles of trash bags. As the camera follows a character in a brown jacket, the environment tightens along the wet walkway while the glow of digital billboards and a softsys neon sign begins to illuminate the path ahead. The scene then opens up as the pedestrian moves aside, allowing the camera to turn right at the corner past a red Capitol sign. Finally, the viewpoint completes the turn onto a cross street, passing a black sports car and revealing a new array of traffic lights and towering digital displays.
